name: sonilo-js-monorepo
description: Monorepo for the Sonilo JavaScript SDK and companion packages

scripts.build: npm run build -w sonilo && npm run build -w sonilo-video-kit
scripts.lint: npm run build -w sonilo && npm run lint --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build -w sonilo && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
